title: Track Roadmap
description: Create and maintain checkbox-based Markdown trackers such as PLAN.md and ROADMAP.md. Use whenever the user asks for PLAN.md or any Markdown tracking file that uses checkbox status markers.
body: When maintaining a Markdown tracking file, keep status rows explicit, auditable, and current. Use checkbox markers with three states: `[ ]` for not started, `[~]` for in progress, and `[x]` for done; keep the user's wording for labels while preserving those status states. Apply this skill to PLAN.md and any checkbox-based roadmap/tracker file, keep entries scoped to concrete deliverables, and update status only when evidence is present in the current repo state.
